'''鈭歯g-v-m''' ('''kangavam''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:branch|branch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-v-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:branch|branch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-v-m
|-
! Lemma
| kangavam
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingavam|thingavam]] || [[word:jingavam|jingavam]] || [[word:shingavam|shingavam]] || [[word:kingavam|kingavam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungavam|thuthungavam]] || [[word:jujungavam|jujungavam]] || [[word:shushungavam|shushungavam]] || [[word:kukungavam|kukungavam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungavam|thungavam]] || [[word:jungavam|jungavam]] || [[word:shungavam|shungavam]] || [[word:kungavam|kungavam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungavam|thungavam]] || [[word:jungavam|jungavam]] || [[word:shungavam|shungavam]] || [[word:kungavam|kungavam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengavam|thengavam]] || [[word:jengavam|jengavam]] || [[word:shengavam|shengavam]] || [[word:kengavam|kengavam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongavam|thothongavam]] || [[word:jojongavam|jojongavam]] || [[word:shoshongavam|shoshongavam]] || [[word:kokongavam|kokongavam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongavam|thongavam]] || [[word:jongavam|jongavam]] || [[word:shongavam|shongavam]] || [[word:kongavam|kongavam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongavam|thongavam]] || [[word:jongavam|jongavam]] || [[word:shongavam|shongavam]] || [[word:kongavam|kongavam]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngavam|ngavam]] || [[word:ngavam|ngavam]] || [[word:ngavam|ngavam]] || [[word:ngavam|ngavam]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngavam|ngavam]] || [[word:ngavam|ngavam]] || [[word:ngavam|ngavam]] || [[word:ngavam|ngavam]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngavam|ngavam]] || [[word:ngavam|ngavam]] || [[word:ngavam|ngavam]] || [[word:ngavam|ngavam]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngavam|ngavam]] || [[word:ngavam|ngavam]] || [[word:ngavam|ngavam]] || [[word:ngavam|ngavam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ngavam|th忙ngavam]] || [[word:j忙ngavam|j忙ngavam]] || [[word:sh忙ngavam|sh忙ngavam]] || [[word:k忙ngavam|k忙ngavam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangavam|thathangavam]] || [[word:jajangavam|jajangavam]] || [[word:shashangavam|shashangavam]] || [[word:kakangavam|kakangavam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangavam|thangavam]] || [[word:jangavam|jangavam]] || [[word:shangavam|shangavam]] || [[word:kangavam|kangavam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangavam|thangavam]] || [[word:jangavam|jangavam]] || [[word:shangavam|shangavam]] || [[word:kangavam|kangavam]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangavam|shangavam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangavam|goshangavam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangavam|gokishangavam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangavamn眉|shangavamn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangavamnkn眉|goshangavamnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangavamn眉|gokishangavamn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangavamsh毛|shangavamsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangavamnksh毛|goshangavamnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangavamsh毛|gokishangavamsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangavamro|shangavamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangavamnkro|goshangavamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangavamro|gokishangavamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangavammu|shangavammu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangavamnkmu|goshangavamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangavammu|gokishangavammu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangavamsher|shangavamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangavamnksher|goshangavamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangavamsher|gokishangavamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangavamng|shangavamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangavamnkng|goshangavamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangavamng|gokishangavamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangavamya|shangavamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangavamnkya|goshangavamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangavamya|gokishangavamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangavamyam|shangavamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangavamnkyam|goshangavamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangavamyam|gokishangavamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangavamn眉sh毛|shangavamn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangavamnkn眉sh毛|goshangavamnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangavamn眉sh毛|gokishangavamn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangavamn眉ro|shangavamn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangavamnkn眉ro|goshangavamnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangavamn眉ro|gokishangavamn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangavamn眉mu|shangavamn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangavamnkn眉mu|goshangavamnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangavamn眉mu|gokishangavamn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangavamsh毛n眉|shangavamsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangavamnksh毛n眉|goshangavamnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangavamsh毛n眉|gokishangavamsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangavamsh毛ro|shangavamsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangavamnksh毛ro|goshangavamnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangavamsh毛ro|gokishangavamsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangavamsh毛mu|shangavamsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangavamnksh毛mu|goshangavamnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangavamsh毛mu|gokishangavamsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangavamron眉|shangavamron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangavamnkron眉|goshangavamnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangavamron眉|gokishangavamron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangavamrosh毛|shangavamrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangavamnkrosh毛|goshangavamnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangavamrosh毛|gokishangavamrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangavamromu|shangavamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangavamnkromu|goshangavamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangavamromu|gokishangavamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangavammun眉|shangavammun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangavamnkmun眉|goshangavamnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangavammun眉|gokishangavammun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangavammush毛|shangavammush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangavamnkmush毛|goshangavamnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangavammush毛|gokishangavammush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangavammuro|shangavammuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangavamnkmuro|goshangavamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangavammuro|gokishangavammuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
